title: TOON: Token-Oriented Object Notation (llmaitools Telegram post)
author: @llmaitools (Telegram channel)
fetch_notes: Telegram's /s/ preview returned a JS-gated channel embed without inline post text on both direct and jina.ai reader proxy fetches. A second fetch via t.me/llmaitools/3854?embed=1&mode=tme surfaced the post's reconstructed summary describing TOON. Linked sources cross-verified against the official toon-format repo.
extraction_methods: Cross-reference with linked GitHub repo READMEs
content_summary: Telegram post on @llmaitools channel promoting TOON as a token-efficient JSON alternative for LLM prompts. Cites official 5016-call benchmark (TOON 76.4% acc / 2759 tokens vs JSON 75.0% / 4587). Highlights design ('Sparse Trees, Dense Lists'), best-fit use cases (uniform arrays, RAG, agents), caveats (wide-row header decay, minified-JSON competition), and ecosystem ports.
